channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New: Alabama Is Free to Redraw Its Maps After SCOTUS Vacates District Court Ruling
From Nebraska to West Virginia to New Jersey: Primary clashes set stage for fierce midterm fight
item.description: Tuesday's primaries in Nebraska, West Virginia and New Jersey set the stage for 2026 midterm battles over control of Congress and key state offices.

item.title: Iran's Leadership May Now Be Eyeing Urgent Escape to Moscow
Southern Redistricting Upends Elections
item.description: Thousands of Louisiana voters have already cast early ballots for congressional candidates in what soon could be the wrong districts. Alabama's primar...
